patent_context.patent_title: Multi-layer thermal insulation panel with phase-change core
patent_context.claim_description: A thermal insulation panel comprising an outer reflective layer, a phase-change material core, and an inner aerogel insulation layer bonded with a thermally conductive adhesive

claims.claim_text: A thermal insulation panel comprising an outer reflective layer; a phase-change material core for thermal energy storage; an inner aerogel insulation layer; and a thermally conductive adhesive bonding the layers

structured_elements.text: phase-change material core for thermal energy storage
thermally conductive adhesive bonding the layers

claims.accused_product_description: The ThermoGuard Standard Panel uses a reflective outer foil and a fibreglass insulation core. It does not contain any phase-change material or aerogel layer. Layers are bonded with standard construction adhesive.

element_mapping_facts.e2: No phase-change material in the product — absent
element_mapping_facts.e3: Uses fibreglass, not aerogel — does not satisfy this element
element_mapping_facts.e4: Standard adhesive, not thermally conductive — not present
